title: qPCR: Bacterial SSU rRNA 338F-516P-805R
author: Roey Angel

steps_raw.instruction: %s %s 1. Relative to E. coli SSU rRNA gene 2. The probe must be dual-labelled either with 5’-6-FAM, 3’-BHQ1 or any other valid combination
